data.body: RELEASE v0.8.0 cut (ticket unevolved-cynical-cats / f7bf): user approved full production release, minor bump 0.7.1->0.8.0. Plan-review PASS+signed (round 2; round 1 BLOCK on docs/api-stability.md version marker enforced by test_version_sync). Claimed. Bumped pyproject+server.json(+packages)+docs/api-stability.md marker; promoted CHANGELOG [Unreleased]->[0.8.0]-2026-07-16 +footer link. Per user request ALSO fixed docs/releasing.md step 1 (was 'git push origin main' -> now Gerrit refs/for/main flow, lists all bump targets incl api-stability) + step1a git-cliff clarification. build produced nava_rebar-0.8.0 wheel+sdist; version_sync test green. Committed aeef68188 (DCO+rebar-ticket trailers), pushed Gerrit change 730 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/730). Awaiting votes; then dispatch release.yml --ref main -f version=0.8.0, approve pypi reviewer gate, monitor publish/github_release/mcp_registry.
